# 🎯 Task 07.6: Adversarial SEO Detection

## 📅 Sprint Info
- **Duration:** 4 days
- **Milestone:** M5 - Quality & Spam
- **Priority:** P0 (Critical for search quality — without this, spam defeats all ranking effort)
- **Depends On:** Task 07.1 (Spam Feature Extraction) ✅, Task 07.4 (Site-Level Reputation) ✅
- **Blocks:** Task 07.5 (Quality Scoring Pipeline update), Task 08.1 (Ranking — spam penalty)
- **Assignee:** TBD

## 🎬 What You'll Build
Detect the most common adversarial SEO manipulation techniques: keyword stuffing, cloaking, doorway pages, thin/scraped content, link scheme signals, and redirect chains. These techniques are used by spammers to rank highly without providing genuine value. The unsupervised models in Tasks 07.2-07.3 detect anomalies but cannot identify specific adversarial patterns. This task adds targeted detectors for known spam playbooks.

## 🧠 Why This Matters
Google's Webmaster Guidelines and many research papers confirm these adversarial techniques account for a significant fraction of spam in any large web index:

| Technique | Prevalence | Impact on rankings without detection |
|-----------|-----------|--------------------------------------|
| Keyword stuffing | Very high | Artificially inflates BM25 score |
| Thin/scraped content | Very high | No real value, duplication |
| Cloaking | Medium | Fools crawlers, misleads users |
| Doorway pages | Medium | Keyword farms, no real content |
| Hidden text | Medium | Invisible keyword injection |
| Link buying schemes | High | Corrupts PageRank/TrustRank |
| Redirect chains | Medium | Deceptive referral path |
| Comment spam | Medium | Generates artificial backlinks |

For Iranian/Persian search, additionally watch for:
- Persian keyword repetition in hidden divs (common in Persian e-commerce spam)
- Fake review pages (جعلی نقد, تقلبی تبلیغ)
- Doorway pages targeting Persian queries with low-quality translated content

## 📋 Daily Breakdown

### Day 1: Keyword Stuffing & Hidden Content Detection
- [ ] Implement keyword density analyzer (target: flag >3.5% density for any term)
- [ ] Detect keyword repetition in meta tags vs body content mismatch
- [ ] Detect hidden text: `display:none`, `visibility:hidden`, font-size:0, white-on-white
- [ ] Detect hidden divs and off-screen elements (CSS `position:absolute; left:-9999px`)
- [ ] Detect `<noscript>` keyword injection (different content for bots)
- [ ] Detect footer keyword blocks (common Persian spam pattern)
- [ ] Compute hidden text ratio (hidden word count / total word count)
- [ ] Unit tests: 40+ HTML patterns

### Day 2: Cloaking, Doorway Pages & Thin Content
- [ ] **Cloaking detection signals** (cannot fully detect without crawl-bot comparison, but use heuristics):
  - Extremely high keyword density + low quality score (mismatch)
  - User-Agent based response variation (compare crawler vs browser headers in test)
  - Page has no external links to it but is linked from many internal pages
- [ ] **Doorway page detection:**
  - Very high keyword density for single short-tail keyword
  - No real navigation links or meaningful content
  - Title, H1, and meta description are near-identical or contain query term 3+ times
  - No outbound links to authoritative sources
  - Near-duplicate of another page on same site with different keyword substituted
- [ ] **Thin content detection:**
  - Word count < 100 after stripping boilerplate (threshold configurable)
  - High ad/content ratio (Task 07.1)
  - Content is primarily navigation menus or lists with no prose
  - Scraping detector: check if content matches known content from trusted domains (via hash lookup)
- [ ] Unit tests: 30+ page pattern tests

### Day 3: Link Scheme & Redirect Chain Detection
- [ ] **Link scheme signals** (host-level analysis):
  - Site has >1000 outbound links per page (likely link farm)
  - All outbound links point to same set of target domains (coordinated scheme)
  - Site receives no organic inbound links except from other low-trust domains
  - Footer links identical across hundreds of pages (paid link bloc)
- [ ] **Redirect chain detection:**
  - Crawl-time: detect chains of 3+ redirects (301/302/JS)
  - Flag final destination if redirect chain passes through known spam domains
  - Detect meta-refresh redirects in HTML (used to manipulate crawlers)
  - Detect JavaScript-only redirects (may cloak to bots)
- [ ] **Comment spam signals** (crawl-time):
  - Page has >50 external links in comment section
  - Comment links are from unrelated domains
- [ ] All signals stored as per-document features in feature store

### Day 4: Ensemble Integration & Manual Review Workflow
- [ ] Combine all adversarial signals into `AdversarialSEOScore` (0-1 scale)
  ```
  AdversarialSEOScore = max(
      keyword_stuffing_score,
      hidden_text_ratio,
      doorway_score,
      thin_content_score * 0.8,
      cloaking_indicators
  )
  ```
  (Use max() not sum() — any single severe signal is disqualifying)
- [ ] Integrate into Task 07.5 quality pipeline: `FinalQuality -= 0.3 * AdversarialSEOScore`
- [ ] Add site-level aggregation: if >30% of a domain's pages score >0.8, flag entire domain
- [ ] **Manual review queue:** export top-500 highest-scoring domains for human review
- [ ] **False-demotion protection:** add appeal/whitelist mechanism for legitimate sites
- [ ] Add monitoring dashboard: count of pages flagged per technique per day
- [ ] Test false positive rate on 100 known-good pages

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Keyword stuffing detected with ≥88% precision, <5% false positive on legitimate pages
- [ ] Hidden text detection: ≥95% on test suite of injected hidden content
- [ ] Doorway page detection: ≥80% precision on hand-labeled sample (30+ examples)
- [ ] Thin content detection: ≥90% recall (≤10 words per page always detected)
- [ ] Scraping detection: ≥85% precision for near-duplicate content from known sources
- [ ] Link scheme detection: ≥75% precision at domain level
- [ ] False demotion rate (legitimate pages flagged): <3%
- [ ] Manual review queue generated: top-500 suspects with evidence
- [ ] No legitimate .ac.ir or .gov.ir domains flagged as spam

## 🧪 Testing Checklist
- [ ] Keyword stuffing tests: 15+ HTML documents with varying densities
- [ ] Hidden text tests: all CSS hiding techniques covered
- [ ] Doorway page tests: 15+ synthetic doorway examples
- [ ] Thin content tests: pages with 0, 50, 100, 200, 500 words
- [ ] Scraped content tests: exact duplicate vs near-duplicate detection
- [ ] False positive tests: 100 legitimate pages from trusted sources
- [ ] Site-level aggregation tests
- [ ] Manual override/whitelist tests

## 📊 Required Evidence
- Precision/recall table for each detector on 30+ labeled examples per category.
- False positive rate on 100 legitimate pages from trusted Iranian sources.
- Top-20 highest-scoring domains by AdversarialSEOScore — manual review result.
- Feature distribution report: show that flagged pages cluster separately from legitimate pages.
- Before/after NDCG comparison when integrating AdversarialSEOScore into ranking.

## 🎉 Celebration Criteria (Definition of Done)
✅ **Demo Ready:** Show top-10 pages detected by each adversarial technique with evidence
✅ **Metric Met:** <3% false demotion rate on legitimate pages
✅ **Integration:** AdversarialSEOScore integrated into quality pipeline
✅ **Quality:** Manual review confirms flagged sites are genuinely spammy

**🎊 Celebration Moment:** Adversarial spam cannot hide from targeted detectors!

## 📦 Deliverables
- `src/python/spam/adversarial_seo.py` (main detector, 600 lines)
- `src/python/spam/keyword_stuffing.py` (200 lines)
- `src/python/spam/cloaking_detector.py` (200 lines)
- `src/python/spam/doorway_detector.py` (250 lines)
- `src/python/spam/thin_content.py` (200 lines)
- `src/python/spam/link_scheme.py` (200 lines)
- `tests/test_adversarial_seo.py` (80+ test cases)
- `docs/spam/adversarial-seo-guide.md`
- `runbooks/manual-spam-review-process.md`

## 🔗 Detector Summary

```python
class AdversarialSEODetector:
    def score(self, page: Document) -> AdversarialReport:
        return AdversarialReport(
            keyword_stuffing=self.detect_keyword_stuffing(page),
            hidden_text=self.detect_hidden_text(page),
            doorway_page=self.detect_doorway(page),
            thin_content=self.detect_thin_content(page),
            cloaking_indicators=self.detect_cloaking_signals(page),
            link_scheme=self.detect_link_scheme(page),
            final_score=self._compute_final(...)  # max-based fusion
        )
```

## ⚠️ Important: False-Demotion Protection
Before any domain is penalized in production, require:
1. Score >0.8 for >10 pages on the domain
2. OR manually reviewed and confirmed
3. AND domain NOT in whitelist (all .ac.ir, .gov.ir are auto-whitelisted)
4. AND domain has been in index for >30 days (new sites get grace period)

This prevents the detector from being weaponized against legitimate competitors by manipulated crawl data.
